name: Peach Pie
recipeIngredient: 5 cups fresh peaches, peeled and sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Line a 9-inch pie pan with pastry.
2. Fill the pan completely with peaches.
3. Sprinkle lemon juice on top of the peaches.
4. Mix together the sugar, flour, and nutmeg in a separate bowl.
5. Sprinkle the mixture evenly over the peaches.
6. Dot the top with small pieces of butter.
7. Cover the pie with the top crust and seal the edges by pressing them together.
8. Cut slits in the top crust to allow steam to escape during baking.
9. Bake at 450 degrees Fahrenheit for 10 minutes, then reduce the temperature to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
10. Continue baking for another 45 minutes until the pie is golden brown.
11. Allow the pie to cool for 30 minutes before serving. It pairs well with whipped cream or vanilla ice cream.
